name: Belt Squat (Lever-Arm)
instructions: Load the lever-arm carriage and stand on the platform with the belt secured around your hips.
Brace your trunk, unrack, and descend under control to depth, keeping the spine neutral.
Drive up through the platform to lockout without leaning on the handles for the rep.
Anchor lift: permanent RIR-2 / RPE-8 cap, every cycle.
